In Memoriam

Researchers in this directory who are no longer with us

The Top 100 and the regional pages list living researchers only, so the directory stays accurate for anyone using it to make contact. This page remembers the 12 researchers from the ranked pool who have passed away, plus a separate listing of foundational figures whose careers predate the digital publication record our pipeline reads from.

From the ranked pool

NameInstitutionCountryYears
Jean BourgainInstitute for Advanced StudyUSd. 2018
Jingrun ChenInstitute of Mathematics, Chinese Academy of SciencesCNd. 1996
Harold DavenportUniversity of CambridgeGBd. 1969
Paul ErdősHungarian Academy of SciencesHUd. 1996
Heini HalberstamUniversity of Illinois Urbana-ChampaignUSd. 2014
C. HooleyCardiff UniversityGBd. 2020
Ming-Chit LiuUniversity of Hong KongHKd. 2023
Christian MauduitAix-Marseille UniversitéFRd. 2019
Kanakanahalli RamachandraTata Institute of Fundamental ResearchINd. 2011
Hans-Egon RichertUniversity of UlmDEd. 1993
Andrzej SchinzelInstitute of Mathematics, Polish Academy of SciencesPLd. 2021
Yuan WangChinese Academy of SciencesCNd. 2021

A researcher missing here, or listed here in error? Email admin@wwin2p1.org and it will be corrected.

Maintained by Steve Hubbard (admin@wwin2p1.org). Data sources: arXiv, OpenAlex, zbMATH Open, Mathematics Genealogy Project.

Last built June 2026.
